name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_srapc_uvw_arcgis_jobs
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_srapc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_arcgis_jobs' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`duedate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completedstatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`createduser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeduser` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`duedate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completedstatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`createduser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeduser` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'createddate|duedate|completedstatus|completeddate|createduser|completeduser' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_srapc`.`uvw_arcgis_jobs`
